headline: Agentic coding tools dominated the quarter as Moonshot shipped a trillion-parameter open-source coding model.
body: Coding-focused techniques led the rotation, with AI coding, AI-assisted development, and code generation holding the top momentum positions, anchored by Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code, a one-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model paired with a terminal-based CLI for repository exploration and test execution. Agentic harness work expanded around it: builders pushed Agentic OS frameworks to extend Claude Code through skills and memory management, while Latent Space framed Meta-style test harnesses as the emerging evaluation standard. Lower-level transformer primitives broke out as new entrants, including embedding, feed-forward network, softmax, optimization bounds, and primitive-action decomposition. Anthropic publicly accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, and Europe pushed back on U.S. chip export restrictions.

cited_items.title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
